# Knowledge Extract Template

## Material Overview
What this material is, where it came from, and why it matters.

## Detailed Breakdown
Structured notes on the material's major components.

## Key Takeaways
Only the durable ideas worth keeping.

## Mental Models Encountered
New or reinforced mental models surfaced by the material.

## Practical Application
Possible applications based on existing context; advisory only.

## Gaps Surfaced
Questions, weaknesses, or unknowns revealed by the material.

## Connections to Existing Knowledge
Where this connects to current domain files or models.

## What Doesn't Belong in Canon
Useful but non-durable, outdated, or too context-specific content.
